scene: Stan's body sitting at a desk while a see-through ghost-Stan floats away daydreaming, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps MIND WANDERING.
A hand pinging a phone that buzzes with a question, a tiny clipboard, flat blue filling the tall frame, big black caps WHERE IS YOUR MIND.
A simple pie chart shaded nearly half, a small Stan beside it, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps 47 PERCENT.
Stan being carried off the ground by a bunch of floating thought balloons, flat soft blue filling the tall frame, big black caps NOT WHERE YOU ARE.
A steering wheel with no hands on it spinning on its own, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps WHO IS STEERING.
